HeyGen

2020Founded
Free Plan Available

About HeyGen

HeyGen is a ai video platform founded in 2020. It positions itself as “Create engaging AI avatar videos at scale” and is best suited for marketing teams, personalized video at scale. Pricing starts at $24/mo, and a free plan is available.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Text To VideoYes
Image To VideoNo
Avatar Talking HeadYes
Screen RecordingNo
Auto CaptionsYes
TemplatesYes
Stock FootageNo
Voice OverYes
Api AccessYes
Batch ProcessingYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Realistic avatar lip sync
  • Video translation feature
  • Custom avatar creation
  • Good API

Cons

  • Credits system can be confusing
  • Avatar quality varies
  • Limited free credits
